cards.front: What is the primary function of the transport layer?
cards.back: To provide reliable data transfer between devices on different networks

cards.front: Which transport-layer protocol is used for reliable data transfer?
What is the purpose of the checksum in TCP?
cards.back: To detect errors in data transmission and request retransmission of corrupted data

cards.front: What is the maximum segment size (MSS) in TCP?
cards.back: The maximum amount of data that can be sent in a single segment

cards.front: What is the connection establishment process called in TCP?
